Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Sunshard Ore

This item can be used in tradeskills.
WT: 0.2 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Lore:Small piece of ore pulsing with energy
Item Type:Combinable
Stackable:1000
Merchant Value:0 pp 0 gp 5 sp 0 cp
Submitted By:Porcinet, Wrathful Inquisition, The Combine
Lucy Entry By:Aryse Andenter SZ
Item Updated By:Gidono
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-11-27 19:16:58
Page Updated:Fri Jun 13th, 2025

Average Price: 500pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Global
Level to Attain: 55

« Previous 1 2 Next »
Post Comment
farming
QuoteReply
# Mar 26 2026 at 2:51 PM Rating: Good
jebler
Sage
134 posts
i found that i was getting 8-14 per full clear of plane of fire and similar per clear of plane of earth. i was fast enough to bounce back and forth just within the respawn time and got 104 of them pretty quick. compared to other global level based trade skill drops these are relatively common. the normal ores and silks are basically unfarmable in comparison. you can kill a thousand appropriate mobs and come out with less then 10. at least we can get those from overseer now.
▲ Page top
sunshard ore

16 posts
Dont forget the monster missions in BB that takes you to instances in lesser fay.

Assaulting
13 posts
Clearing CoD in PoP got me 10 sunshards ore buy round, i dont know better place. Drop from pulshing and Rats
▲ Page top
Sunshard Ore
QuoteReply
# Jul 05 2025 at 11:44 AM Rating: Decent
Morlaeth
Scholar
73 posts
Drops from everything of appropriate level in that loop. Bubonic rats, pulsing zombie things, and undead guys.
▲ Page top
24% drop rate... for real?
QuoteReply
# Jul 05 2013 at 8:10 AM Rating: Decent
Sippin
Sage
3,058 posts
According to Magelo's item search plug-in the best return for investment for this item is from a mechano steam sentry (level 87-89) found in The Mechamatic Guardian zone, which is part of the solo task quests offered by the gnome in Steamfont. And the data is substantial here, as of today 476 dropped from 1924 kills, a 24% rate. Not sure if this is "anniversary mission" only thing, since that is by far the largest amount of data they have on record for this drop item and that would lead me to think this much data comes from the missions that people were using for PL purposes last year during the anniversary.

Since this mob seems to have an annoying knockback, not sure how easy it would be to mass-kill them to pharm this TS item. Not even sure it's a "common" mob altho 1924 kills on record would seem to support that it is.

The next most prolific source is a fearless skeleton in MPG, a rate of 6 out of 28, or 21%. Not bad and a much easier mob to kill (level 65), altho it sounds rather uncommon, maybe even a quest mob. (Actually it spawns in an MPG trial so not an easy mob to pharm, prolly, since will take considerable effort to get a lot of this "species" to kill!)

I'm in need of this item for tinkering on FV, btw, so I will report back here if I find a fertile source! I sure would like to find a better than 4% drop rate.

BTW, I do think listing zones for this drop is almost pointless. It's "dropability" seems to be tied to mob level more than anything else and it appears to drop almost everywhere, albeit uncommonly. A lot of the drops are from instances and I wouldn't be surprised if those rates are a bit higher, but instances have their own downsides to pharming something like this when you need a whole lot of it.

Edited, Jul 5th 2013 10:14am by Sippin
____________________________
Sippin 115 DRU **** Firiona Vie ****Agnarr
FV: 115 WAR ENC CLE MAG WIZ SHD SHM Master Alchemist ROG Master Tinkerer & Poison-Maker
Master Artisan (300+) * Baker * Brewer * Fletcher * Jeweler * Potter * Researcher * Smith * Tailor
Agnarr: 65 DRU ENC SHD MAG CLE ROG WIZ BRD WAR PAL BST RNG MNK
▲ Page top
Drop Rate and best farming
QuoteReply
# Jun 29 2011 at 4:58 PM Rating: Decent
ecidew
Scholar
73 posts
I think all anyone wants to know these days ... is where is the best farming .. hence drop rate off mobs is more valuable than what mobs drop em. Like I cleared the plane of Invention more than once and got none :(

If 4% over all drop rate is true for mobs that drop em .. which seams high .. and it take 2,500 - 3,000 combines to max the tinkering trophy stating at a skill of 250 .. it will be a long time before I am done !!

If you have 4 or more drop for a 100 kills I would really like to know where :)

Edited, Jun 29th 2011 1:00pm by ecidew

Confirmed Drops *please update web page*
QuoteReply
# Nov 15 2007 at 4:07 PM Rating: Decent
stosstruppen
66 posts
Drops of this item in Veksar (I live in veksar) is as followed..

Highborn Commander
A Highborn Noble
A Insane Highborn
Highborn
Wraith
Revenant
Animated Hand
Grandmaster area / building
All mobs in the theater
All mobs in the tunnles
Undead drog building

All the above are Phase 3 part of the zone mobs..

So more or less all the mobs from the Theater, Highborn, Tunnles, Grandmaster, Hands - Area's.. I like to call phase 3 of veksar based on mob level.. *Phase 1 being the entrance to the water tunnle / Phase 2 being everything from the water tunnle to the theater - drop off platform to the highborns - which leads you to phase 3 of the zone.. I am confirming that they drop from that entire part of the zone.. Good luck all..

Bodystompper Gigolo - 70 Paladin - Veteran of Povar
Bedfriend Nitely - 70 BST & 66 Warrior Pet *box* - Veteran of Povar


Edited, Nov 15th 2007 7:08pm by stosstruppen

Bazaar Price
QuoteReply
# Oct 06 2007 at 1:26 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592310666403
78 posts
In the last few monthsâ€™ Iâ€™ve known people to sell full stacks (100) of these at 1000 - 1500p. Bazaar Prices range from 450p (rarely) to 3000p. (1000 - 2000 average) The bazaar very occasionally has run out, which may indicate that people have sold them very rarely at prices set higher than average. I havenâ€™t seen this in the last month though so those days may be over. They can often be sold at the bazaar to players (/barter) from 100-650p. Prices still seem to be on an upward trend, but may be stabilizing soon. More venders are carrying full or near full stacks so it would seem that sales are bound to slow now and prices will either hold or begin to drop.

▲ Page top
My experience
QuoteReply
# Aug 31 2007 at 10:09 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591923873379
Scholar
319 posts
From what I have seen, this seems to be most common from LB mobs, but I have seen it from green mobs on occasion (color of mob with reference to level 75). I have had it drop for me in Black Feather Roost, Sanctus Seru, SSRA Temple, and elsewhere. Regarding Sanctus Seru: I have hunted the top floors of the guild buildings for quest items, research components, and small brick of yttrium ore. Sunshard Ore drops at about one Sunshard Ore for every three or four small brick of ytrrium ore. If you are working on tradeskills, the Sunshard Ore can get you to 300 in multiple tradeskills, including research and tinkering (as I am working on), and the small brick of ytrrium ore can get you to 300 in smithing and tinkering. I have had Sunshard Ore and small brick of yttrium ore also drop in Sanctus Seru from LB mobs just about anywhere I have found them in SS. A word of warning about SS: there are bunches of Guild Masters in SS in the guild buildings (which are the four buildings which surround Seru's hideout). These guildmasters are high DPS/ High AC and a major pain if you get two at once, and a bunch of adds as is common in getting to the top floor. The GM's all see invis, so good luck.

The comments regarding usefulness of drops apply to players of the appropriate races and classes.

# May 18 2007 at 8:20 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1666570595850
View User Forum
59 posts
got 9 of these from Bazu Alley camp in Nobles Causeway, they drop from the bazus there, for those of you who dont know where the camp is it the one at the end of the packmaster camp. get to the end of packmaster camp theirs a bazu in the crevice if you take a right theres a feran if you go up on the ridge to the left theirs a roaming bazu there, around the corner theirs a feran and another roaming bazu, theirs 4 bazus there some ferans and some murks, nice place to farm the ore bazu blood and bazu skins, theirs also 2 named that pop there.
